[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ObserverMapConfig](../fast-element.observermapconfig/index.html) &gt; [schema](../fast-element.observermapconfig.schema/index.html)

## ObserverMapConfig.schema property

The schema to use for observer-map configuration. Pass this for non-declarative/manual schema use. When omitted, the extension uses the schema on the FAST element definition.

**Signature:**

```typescript
schema?: Schema;
```
